为什么 Q::header() 而不是 header()？

blocks.html_en: The server runs PHP in CLI SAPI (same as FrankenPHP worker mode and Workerman). PHP's built-in header() is silently discarded in CLI mode. Q::header() has the exact same signature but captures headers so the server can send them:

sentences.en: The server runs PHP in CLI SAPI (same as FrankenPHP worker mode and Workerman).
sentences.zh: 服务器在 CLI SAPI 中运行 PHP（与 FrankenPHP 工作模式和 Workerman 相同）。

sentences.en: PHP's built-in header() is silently discarded in CLI mode.
sentences.zh: PHP 的内置 header() 在 CLI 模式下会被默默丢弃。

sentences.en: Q::header() has the exact same signature but captures headers so the server can send them:
sentences.zh: Q::header() 具有完全相同的签名，但捕获标头，以便服务器可以发送它们：

blocks.html_en: For existing code that calls header() directly, use CGI carveout mode — configure URL patterns in server.json under Q.webserver.cgi.patterns to run those scripts via php-cgi where native header() works (see Configuration).

sentences.en: For existing code that calls header() directly, use CGI carveout mode — configure URL patterns in server.json under Q.webserver.cgi.patterns to run those scripts via php-cgi where native header() works (see Configuration).
sentences.zh: 对于直接调用 header() 的现有代码，请使用 CGI carveout 模式 - 在 Q.webserver.cgi.patterns 下的 server.json 中配置 URL 模式，以在本机 header() 工作的情况下通过 php-cgi 运行这些脚本（请参阅配置）。

blocks.html_en: When you upgrade to the full Qbix Platform, the Q class expands with hundreds more methods — but everything above continues to work identically. Your scripts don't need to change.

sentences.en: When you upgrade to the full Qbix Platform, the Q class expands with hundreds more methods — but everything above continues to work identically.
sentences.zh: 当您升级到完整的 Qbix 平台时，Q 类会扩展数百个方法 - 但上面的所有内容都将继续以相同的方式工作。

sentences.en: Your scripts don't need to change.
sentences.zh: 您的脚本不需要更改。

blocks.html_en: Classes — autoloaded and optionally preloaded

sentences.zh: 类 - 自动加载和可选预加载

blocks.html_en: Drop a PHP file in classes/ and it's autoloaded — found automatically the first time your code references it. No require needed. Both naming conventions work:

sentences.en: Drop a PHP file in classes/ and it's autoloaded — found automatically the first time your code references it.
sentences.zh: 将 PHP 文件放入classes/ 中，它就会自动加载——在您的代码第一次引用它时会自动找到它。
不需要任何要求。
两种命名约定都有效：

blocks.html_en: Both are available immediately in your web/*.php scripts:

sentences.en: Both are available immediately in your web/*.php scripts:
sentences.zh: 两者都可以在您的 web/*.php 脚本中立即使用：

blocks.html_en: The autoloader maps class names to file paths (MyApp\User → classes/MyApp/User.php, MyApp_Auth → classes/MyApp/Auth.php) and bridges between conventions with class_alias — if you define MyApp_Auth, it's also accessible as MyApp\Auth, and vice versa. If you have a Composer autoload.php, that works too — list it in the preload config and both autoloaders coexist.

sentences.en: The autoloader maps class names to file paths (MyApp\User → classes/MyApp/User.php, MyApp_Auth → classes/MyApp/Auth.php) and bridges between conventions with class_alias — if you define MyApp_Auth, it's also accessible as MyApp\Auth, and vice versa.
sentences.zh: 自动加载器将类名映射到文件路径（MyApp\User→classes/MyApp/User.php、MyApp_Auth→classes/MyApp/Auth.php），并在带有 class_alias 的约定之间建立桥梁 - 如果您定义 MyApp_Auth，也可以通过 MyApp\Auth 进行访问，反之亦然。

sentences.en: If you have a Composer autoload.php, that works too — list it in the preload config and both autoloaders coexist.
sentences.zh: 如果您有 Composer autoload.php，那也可以 - 将其列在预加载配置中，并且两个自动加载器共存。

blocks.html_en: Preloading is optional but recommended for --workers=N mode. It loads specific classes into memory before forking workers, so the autoloader never runs during requests — classes are already there via copy-on-write:

sentences.en: Preloading is optional but recommended for --workers=N mode.
sentences.zh: 预加载是可选的，但建议用于 --workers=N 模式。

sentences.en: It loads specific classes into memory before forking workers, so the autoloader never runs during requests — classes are already there via copy-on-write:
sentences.zh: 它在分叉工作程序之前将特定的类加载到内存中，因此自动加载器永远不会在请求期间运行 - 类已经通过写时复制而存在：

blocks.html_en: Classes are eager — loaded once at startup, shared across all workers via copy-on-write. This is the "hot path" code that handles every request.

sentences.en: Classes are eager — loaded once at startup, shared across all workers via copy-on-write.
sentences.zh: 类是渴望的——在启动时加载一次，通过写时复制在所有工作人员之间共享。

sentences.en: This is the "hot path" code that handles every request.
sentences.zh: 这是处理每个请求的“热路径”代码。
处理程序——按需加载

blocks.html_en: Handlers are the opposite of classes: they're loaded only when their event fires. Drop a file in handlers/ and it's available as an event:

sentences.en: Handlers are the opposite of classes: they're loaded only when their event fires.
sentences.zh: 处理程序与类相反：它们仅在事件触发时才加载。

sentences.en: Drop a file in handlers/ and it's available as an event:
sentences.zh: 将文件放入 handlers/ 中，它可以作为事件使用：
从任何地方发射它：

blocks.html_en: The handler file is include'd the first time the event fires, then the function stays in memory. If the event never fires, the file is never loaded. This is ideal for things like webhooks, admin actions, and error handlers — code that runs rarely but needs to be available.

sentences.en: The handler file is include'd the first time the event fires, then the function stays in memory.
sentences.zh: 事件第一次触发时会包含处理程序文件，然后该函数将保留在内存中。

sentences.en: If the event never fires, the file is never loaded.
sentences.zh: 如果该事件从未触发，则该文件永远不会加载。

sentences.en: This is ideal for things like webhooks, admin actions, and error handlers — code that runs rarely but needs to be available.
sentences.zh: 这对于 webhooks、管理操作和错误处理程序等很少运行但需要可用的代码来说是理想的选择。
检查处理程序是否存在：
钩子之前/之后

blocks.html_en: You can attach hooks to any event via config — useful for validation, logging, access control, or cross-cutting concerns:

sentences.en: You can attach hooks to any event via config — useful for validation, logging, access control, or cross-cutting concerns:
sentences.zh: 您可以通过配置将挂钩附加到任何事件 - 对于验证、日志记录、访问控制或横切关注点很有用：

blocks.html_en: The chain is: before hooks → main handler → after hooks. Any before hook returning false stops the chain. This is the same pattern the full Qbix Platform uses — your handlers work identically when you upgrade.

sentences.en: The chain is: before hooks → main handler → after hooks.
sentences.zh: 链是：钩子之前→主处理程序→钩子之后。

sentences.en: Any before hook returning false stops the chain.
sentences.zh: 任何 before hook 返回 false 都会停止链。

sentences.en: This is the same pattern the full Qbix Platform uses — your handlers work identically when you upgrade.
sentences.zh: 这与完整的 Qbix 平台使用的模式相同 - 当您升级时，您的处理程序的工作方式相同。
远程处理程序

blocks.html_en: Handlers can also be URLs. If a handler name in the config starts with http:// or https://, the server POSTs the event parameters as JSON to that URL instead of loading a local PHP file:

sentences.zh: 处理程序也可以是 URL。

sentences.en: If a handler name in the config starts with http:// or https://, the server POSTs the event parameters as JSON to that URL instead of loading a local PHP file:
sentences.zh: 如果配置中的处理程序名称以 http:// 或 https:// 开头，服务器会将事件参数以 JSON 形式 POST 到该 URL，而不是加载本地 PHP 文件：

blocks.html_en: When Q::event('MyApp/user/register', $params) fires, the local handler runs first, then the server POSTs $params as JSON to the remote URL. This is webhooks built into the event system — no separate webhook infrastructure needed.

sentences.en: When Q::event('MyApp/user/register', $params) fires, the local handler runs first, then the server POSTs $params as JSON to the remote URL.
sentences.zh: 当 Q::event('MyApp/user/register', $params) 触发时，本地处理程序首先运行，然后服务器将 $params 作为 JSON 发送到远程 URL。

sentences.en: This is webhooks built into the event system — no separate webhook infrastructure needed.
sentences.zh: 这是事件系统中内置的 Webhook - 不需要单独的 Webhook 基础设施。

blocks.html_en: Classes are eager. Handlers are lazy. Scripts are per-request. Views are on-demand. This gives you the right loading strategy for each kind of code without thinking about it — just put files in the right directory.

sentences.zh: 上课很热心。
处理者很懒。
脚本是根据请求而定的。
视图是按需的。

sentences.en: This gives you the right loading strategy for each kind of code without thinking about it — just put files in the right directory.
sentences.zh: 这为您提供了每种代码的正确加载策略，无需考虑 - 只需将文件放在正确的目录中即可。
Workers：按请求分叉（真正无共享）

blocks.html_en: Each worker handles exactly one request, then exits. The parent immediately forks a replacement. This means:

sentences.en: Each worker handles exactly one request, then exits.
sentences.zh: 每个工作人员只处理一个请求，然后退出。

sentences.en: The parent immediately forks a replacement.
sentences.zh: 父级立即分叉一个替代品。
这意味着：
静态变量 - 擦除（进程模具）
全局状态 — 已擦除（进程死亡）
内存泄漏——不可能（操作系统回收一切）

sentences.en: Secrets in memory — gone (no persistence between requests)
sentences.zh: 内存中的秘密 — 消失了（请求之间没有持久性）

blocks.html_en: This is safer than php-fpm, which reuses workers across requests and relies on pm.max_requests to periodically recycle them. With Qbix Server, every request gets a clean process. The fork cost (~0.5ms) is negligible compared to the bootstrap savings (~10–50ms).

sentences.en: This is safer than php-fpm, which reuses workers across requests and relies on pm.max_requests to periodically recycle them.
sentences.zh: 这比 php-fpm 更安全，后者跨请求重用工作人员并依赖 pm.max_requests 定期回收它们。

sentences.en: With Qbix Server, every request gets a clean process.
sentences.zh: 有了 Qbix Server，每个请求都会得到一个干净的处理。

sentences.en: The fork cost (~0.5ms) is negligible compared to the bootstrap savings (~10–50ms).
sentences.zh: 与引导节省（~10-50ms）相比，分叉成本（~0.5ms）可以忽略不计。

blocks.html_en: How PHP requests are handled

sentences.zh: PHP 请求是如何处理的

blocks.html_en: On Linux and macOS (where pcntl_fork is available), every PHP request is forked — even without --workers. The server forks a child, the child handles the request and exits, the parent continues serving. This means:

sentences.en: On Linux and macOS (where pcntl_fork is available), every PHP request is forked — even without --workers.
sentences.zh: 在 Linux 和 macOS（其中 pcntl_fork 可用）上，每个 PHP 请求都会被分叉——即使没有 --workers。

sentences.en: The server forks a child, the child handles the request and exits, the parent continues serving.
sentences.zh: 服务器分叉一个子进程，子进程处理请求并退出，父进程继续提供服务。
这意味着：

blocks.html_en: • exit() / die() in a script only kills the child — the server survives

sentences.en: exit() / die() in a script only kills the child — the server survives
sentences.zh: 脚本中的 exit() / die() 只会杀死子进程 - 服务器幸存

blocks.html_en: • Long-running scripts don't block static file serving

sentences.en: Long-running scripts don't block static file serving
sentences.zh: 长时间运行的脚本不会阻止静态文件服务
每个请求都是真正隔离的

blocks.html_en: The --workers=N flag pre-forks N idle workers for faster dispatch (no fork latency per request). Without it, the server forks on demand. Both modes are shared-nothing.

sentences.en: The --workers=N flag pre-forks N idle workers for faster dispatch (no fork latency per request).
sentences.zh: --workers=N 标志预先分叉 N 个空闲工作线程以加快调度速度（每个请求没有分叉延迟）。

sentences.en: Without it, the server forks on demand.
sentences.zh: 没有它，服务器将按需分叉。
两种模式都是无共享的。

blocks.html_en: Windows doesn't have pcntl_fork, so PHP scripts run in a subprocess via proc_open. This is safe — exit() can't crash the server — but each subprocess starts a fresh PHP interpreter (~50ms), so you don't get the preload speed benefit. Static files, WebSocket, caching, and everything else work identically. Good for development; use Linux/macOS for the full 10x performance advantage.

sentences.en: Windows doesn't have pcntl_fork, so PHP scripts run in a subprocess via proc_open.
sentences.zh: Windows 没有 pcntl_fork，因此 PHP 脚本通过 proc_open 在子进程中运行。

sentences.en: This is safe — exit() can't crash the server — but each subprocess starts a fresh PHP interpreter (~50ms), so you don't get the preload speed benefit.
sentences.zh: 这是安全的 — exit() 不会使服务器崩溃 — 但每个子进程都会启动一个新的 PHP 解释器（约 50 毫秒），因此您无法获得预加载速度的优势。

sentences.en: Static files, WebSocket, caching, and everything else work identically.
sentences.zh: 静态文件、WebSocket、缓存和其他所有内容的工作方式都是相同的。

sentences.en: Good for development; use Linux/macOS for the full 10x performance advantage.
sentences.zh: 有利于发展；使用 Linux/macOS 可获得 10 倍的全部性能优势。

blocks.html_en: Growing into the full Qbix Platform

sentences.en: Growing into the full Qbix Platform
sentences.zh: 成长为完整的 Qbix 平台

blocks.html_en: The conventions above — classes/, handlers/, views/, config/ — are the same ones the Qbix Platform uses. When your project outgrows the micro-framework and you need user accounts, real-time streams, access control, payments, or a plugin system, you switch to --app mode and everything you've written keeps working. Your classes stay in classes/, your handlers stay in handlers/, your views stay in views/. You just gain access to Streams, Users, Assets, and the rest of the plugin ecosystem — without rewriting anything.

sentences.en: The conventions above — classes/, handlers/, views/, config/ — are the same ones the Qbix Platform uses.
sentences.zh: 上面的约定——classes/、handlers/、views/、config/——与 Qbix 平台使用的约定相同。

sentences.en: When your project outgrows the micro-framework and you need user accounts, real-time streams, access control, payments, or a plugin system, you switch to --app mode and everything you've written keeps working.
sentences.zh: 当您的项目超出微框架的规模并且您需要用户帐户、实时流、访问控制、支付或插件系统时，您可以切换到 --app 模式，并且您编写的所有内容都可以继续工作。

sentences.en: Your classes stay in classes/, your handlers stay in handlers/, your views stay in views/.
sentences.zh: 你的类保留在classes/中，你的处理程序保留在handlers/中，你的视图保留在views/中。

sentences.en: You just gain access to Streams, Users, Assets, and the rest of the plugin ecosystem — without rewriting anything.
sentences.zh: 您只需访问流、用户、资产和插件生态系统的其余部分 - 无需重写任何内容。

blocks.html_en: Serve multiple domains from one server. Each host can have its own document root:

sentences.en: Serve multiple domains from one server.
sentences.zh: 从一台服务器为多个域提供服务。

sentences.en: Each host can have its own document root:
sentences.zh: 每个主机可以有自己的文档根：

blocks.html_en: The Host header selects the root. Requests for unconfigured hosts use the default --root directory. WebSocket, rooms, handlers, and static files all respect the per-host root.

sentences.en: The Host header selects the root.
sentences.zh: Host 标头选择根。

sentences.en: Requests for unconfigured hosts use the default --root directory.
sentences.zh: 对未配置主机的请求使用默认的 --root 目录。

sentences.en: WebSocket, rooms, handlers, and static files all respect the per-host root.
sentences.zh: WebSocket、房间、处理程序和静态文件都尊重每个主机的根。
热重载

sentences.en: Watch classes/, handlers/, and config/ for file changes:
sentences.zh: 监视classes/、handlers/和config/的文件更改：
或者通过配置：

blocks.html_en: Handler changes take effect immediately — handlers are lazy-loaded, so the next request or connection picks up the new code. Class or config changes trigger a graceful restart (the server re-execs itself with the same arguments).

sentences.en: Handler changes take effect immediately — handlers are lazy-loaded, so the next request or connection picks up the new code.
sentences.zh: 处理程序更改立即生效 - 处理程序是延迟加载的，因此下一个请求或连接将获取新代码。

sentences.en: Class or config changes trigger a graceful restart (the server re-execs itself with the same arguments).
sentences.zh: 类或配置更改会触发正常重启（服务器使用相同的参数重新执行自身）。
更改会记录到 stderr：

blocks.html_en: Polls every 2 seconds. Recommended for development.

sentences.zh: 每 2 秒进行一次轮询。
推荐用于开发。

blocks.html_en: Even without --hotreload, handler changes take effect naturally: HTTP requests fork fresh and load handlers on demand, so the next request gets the new file. WebSocket connections and rooms keep the old code for their lifetime — new connections pick up the change. A natural rolling deploy with no interruption. The --hotreload flag adds automatic restart for class and config changes, which are preloaded in the parent process.

sentences.en: Even without --hotreload, handler changes take effect naturally: HTTP requests fork fresh and load handlers on demand, so the next request gets the new file.
sentences.zh: 即使没有 --hotreload，处理程序更改也会自然生效：HTTP 请求根据需要派生新的处理程序并加载处理程序，因此下一个请求将获取新文件。

sentences.en: WebSocket connections and rooms keep the old code for their lifetime — new connections pick up the change.
sentences.zh: WebSocket 连接和房间在其生命周期内保留旧代码 - 新连接会接受更改。

sentences.en: A natural rolling deploy with no interruption.
sentences.zh: 自然滚动部署，不间断。

sentences.en: The --hotreload flag adds automatic restart for class and config changes, which are preloaded in the parent process.
sentences.zh: --hotreload 标志添加了类和配置更改的自动重启，这些更改是在父进程中预加载的。

blocks.html_en: If Q.handlers.preload is true (production mode), handlers are also loaded in the parent — use --reload to pick up handler changes in that case.

sentences.en: If Q.handlers.preload is true (production mode), handlers are also loaded in the parent — use --reload to pick up handler changes in that case.
sentences.zh: 如果 Q.handlers.preload 为 true（生产模式），则处理程序也会加载到父级中 - 在这种情况下使用 --reload 来获取处理程序更改。
调度程序

blocks.html_en: Run tasks on intervals or at specific times. Handlers are forked like HTTP requests — they don't block the event loop and respect requestTimeout.

sentences.en: Run tasks on intervals or at specific times.
sentences.zh: 定期或在特定时间运行任务。

sentences.en: Handlers are forked like HTTP requests — they don't block the event loop and respect requestTimeout.
sentences.zh: 处理程序像 HTTP 请求一样分叉 — 它们不会阻塞事件循环并遵守 requestTimeout。
它的作用
处理程序

blocks.html_en: Handler path — dispatched via Q::event(), same as HTTP handlers

sentences.en: Handler path — dispatched via Q::event(), same as HTTP handlers
sentences.zh: 处理程序路径 — 通过 Q::event() 调度，与 HTTP 处理程序相同

sentences.en: Run every N seconds from startup
sentences.zh: 从启动后每 N 秒运行一次

sentences.en: Run at specific HH:MM times (24h format)
sentences.zh: 在特定的 HH:MM 时间运行（24 小时格式）
工作日

sentences.en: Only fire on these days: mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun
sentences.zh: 仅在这些日子点火：周一、周二、周三、周四、周五、周六、周日
月日

blocks.html_en: Only fire on these days of the month: [1], [1, 15], etc.

sentences.en: Only fire on these days of the month: [1], [1, 15], etc.
sentences.zh: 仅在该月的这些天触发：[1]、[1, 15] 等。

blocks.html_en: The handler receives $params['task'] (the task name) and $params['scheduled'] = true:

sentences.en: The handler receives $params['task'] (the task name) and $params['scheduled'] = true:
sentences.zh: 处理程序接收 $params['task'] （任务名称）和 $params['scheduled'] = true：

blocks.html_en: On restart, tasks scheduled for the current minute are skipped to avoid double-firing. Interval tasks wait one full interval before their first run.

sentences.en: On restart, tasks scheduled for the current minute are skipped to avoid double-firing.
sentences.zh: 重新启动时，将跳过当前分钟计划的任务以避免重复触发。

sentences.en: Interval tasks wait one full interval before their first run.
sentences.zh: 间隔任务在第一次运行之前等待一个完整的时间间隔。

blocks.html_en: CGI carveout mode — legacy PHP compatibility

sentences.en: CGI carveout mode — legacy PHP compatibility
sentences.zh: CGI 剥离模式 — 旧版 PHP 兼容性

blocks.html_en: Scripts matching Q.webserver.cgi.patterns run via php-cgi subprocess instead of fork. Native header(), setcookie(), session_start() all work — full compatibility with WordPress, Laravel, or any PHP code that calls header() directly.

sentences.en: Scripts matching Q.webserver.cgi.patterns run via php-cgi subprocess instead of fork.
sentences.zh: 匹配 Q.webserver.cgi.patterns 的脚本通过 php-cgi 子进程而不是 fork 运行。

sentences.en: Native header(), setcookie(), session_start() all work — full compatibility with WordPress, Laravel, or any PHP code that calls header() directly.
sentences.zh: 本机 header()、setcookie()、session_start() 都可以工作 — 与 WordPress、Laravel 或任何直接调用 header() 的 PHP 代码完全兼容。

blocks.html_en: The tradeoff: CGI mode starts a fresh PHP interpreter per request (~50ms), so you don't get the preload speed benefit. Static files, caching, and everything else still work at full speed. Use this for third-party code you can't modify — your own code should use Q::header() and the fork path for 10x performance.

sentences.en: The tradeoff: CGI mode starts a fresh PHP interpreter per request (~50ms), so you don't get the preload speed benefit.
sentences.zh: 权衡：CGI 模式为每个请求启动一个新的 PHP 解释器（约 50 毫秒），因此您无法获得预加载速度优势。

sentences.en: Static files, caching, and everything else still work at full speed.
sentences.zh: 静态文件、缓存和其他一切仍然全速运行。

sentences.en: Use this for third-party code you can't modify — your own code should use Q::header() and the fork path for 10x performance.
sentences.zh: 将此用于您无法修改的第三方代码 - 您自己的代码应该使用 Q::header() 和 fork 路径以获得 10 倍的性能。

blocks.html_en: The server auto-detects php-cgi on your system. Override with cgi.binary:

sentences.en: The server auto-detects php-cgi on your system.
sentences.zh: 服务器自动检测您系统上的 php-cgi。
使用 cgi.binary 覆盖：

blocks.html_en: Running legacy PHP — WordPress, Laravel, Symfony

sentences.en: Running legacy PHP — WordPress, Laravel, Symfony
sentences.zh: 运行旧版 PHP — WordPress、Laravel、Symfony

blocks.html_en: You can run existing PHP applications on Qbix Server without modifying their code. The key: put the framework's public directory as web/, and use CGI carveout patterns to match all PHP files.

sentences.en: You can run existing PHP applications on Qbix Server without modifying their code.
sentences.zh: 您可以在 Qbix Server 上运行现有的 PHP 应用程序，而无需修改其代码。

sentences.en: The key: put the framework's public directory as web/, and use CGI carveout patterns to match all PHP files.
sentences.zh: 关键：将框架的公共目录放置为web/，并使用CGI carveout模式来匹配所有PHP文件。

blocks.html_en: The pattern #\\.php$# sends all PHP files through php-cgi. The fallback sends unmatched URLs to index.php (WordPress permalink routing). Static files (images, CSS, JS) are served directly at full speed.

sentences.en: The pattern #\\.php$# sends all PHP files through php-cgi.
sentences.zh: 模式 #\\.php$# 通过 php-cgi 发送所有 PHP 文件。

sentences.en: The fallback sends unmatched URLs to index.php (WordPress permalink routing).
sentences.zh: 后备将不匹配的 URL 发送到 index.php（WordPress 永久链接路由）。

sentences.en: Static files (images, CSS, JS) are served directly at full speed.
sentences.zh: 静态文件（图像、CSS、JS）直接全速提供。
拉拉维尔：

blocks.html_en: All requests that don't match a static file go to index.php. Laravel's router takes over from there. The app/, vendor/, and storage/ directories are outside web/ — inaccessible via URL by default.

sentences.en: All requests that don't match a static file go to index.php.
sentences.zh: 所有与静态文件不匹配的请求都会转到index.php。

sentences.en: Laravel's router takes over from there.
sentences.zh: Laravel 的路由器从那里接管。

sentences.en: The app/, vendor/, and storage/ directories are outside web/ — inaccessible via URL by default.
sentences.zh: app/、vendor/ 和 storage/ 目录位于 web/ 之外 — 默认情况下无法通过 URL 访问。
交响乐：

blocks.html_en: Same config pattern. Symfony's front controller (public/index.php) handles all routing internally.

sentences.zh: 相同的配置模式。

sentences.en: Symfony's front controller (public/index.php) handles all routing internally.
sentences.zh: Symfony 的前端控制器 (public/index.php) 在内部处理所有路由。
移植您自己的遗留代码：

blocks.html_en: For code you control, you have three options — from least effort to best performance:

sentences.en: For code you control, you have three options — from least effort to best performance:
sentences.zh: 对于您控制的代码，您有三种选择 - 从最少的努力到最佳的性能：
选项 1：完整 CGI（零更改，速度较慢）

blocks.html_en: Every PHP file runs through php-cgi. Native header(), setcookie(), session_start() all work. No code changes. Performance is comparable to nginx + php-fpm (no preload benefit).

sentences.en: Every PHP file runs through php-cgi.
sentences.zh: 每个 PHP 文件都通过 php-cgi 运行。

sentences.en: Native header(), setcookie(), session_start() all work.
sentences.zh: 本机 header()、setcookie()、session_start() 都可以工作。
没有代码更改。

blocks.html_en: Static files are served from an in-memory response cache. The full HTTP response (headers + body) is pre-built and sent in a single fwrite() call. The cache is mtime-validated with configurable check intervals. Combined with TCP_NODELAY, this delivers sub-millisecond response times.

sentences.en: Static files are served from an in-memory response cache.
sentences.zh: 静态文件由内存中的响应缓存提供。

sentences.en: The full HTTP response (headers + body) is pre-built and sent in a single fwrite() call.
sentences.zh: 完整的 HTTP 响应（标头 + 正文）是预先构建的，并在单个 fwrite() 调用中发送。

sentences.en: The cache is mtime-validated with configurable check intervals.
sentences.zh: 缓存通过可配置的检查间隔进行实时验证。

sentences.en: Combined with TCP_NODELAY, this delivers sub-millisecond response times.
sentences.zh: 与 TCP_NODELAY 相结合，可提供亚毫秒级响应时间。

blocks.html_en: PHP scripts run in-process (single-threaded, suitable for lightweight APIs) or in a pre-fork worker pool (--workers=N) for concurrent PHP execution. Workers are forked after class preloading, so they share the base memory footprint via copy-on-write pages.

sentences.en: PHP scripts run in-process (single-threaded, suitable for lightweight APIs) or in a pre-fork worker pool (--workers=N) for concurrent PHP execution.
sentences.zh: PHP 脚本在进程内运行（单线程，适合轻量级 API）或在预分叉工作池 (--workers=N) 中运行，以实现并发 PHP 执行。

sentences.en: Workers are forked after class preloading, so they share the base memory footprint via copy-on-write pages.
sentences.zh: Worker 在类预加载后被分叉，因此它们通过写时复制页面共享基本内存占用。

blocks.html_en: The remaining gap versus nginx on non-keep-alive requests (55–73%) is inherent: nginx uses sendfile() (kernel-space file→socket copy) and compiled C. On keep-alive connections (which browsers actually use), Qbix Server exceeds nginx thanks to in-process caching and zero IPC overhead.

sentences.en: The remaining gap versus nginx on non-keep-alive requests (55–73%) is inherent: nginx uses sendfile() (kernel-space file→socket copy) and compiled C.
sentences.zh: 在非保持活动请求上与 nginx 的剩余差距 (55-73%) 是固有的：nginx 使用 sendfile() （内核空间文件→套接字复制）并编译 C。

sentences.en: On keep-alive connections (which browsers actually use), Qbix Server exceeds nginx thanks to in-process caching and zero IPC overhead.
sentences.zh: 在保持活动连接（浏览器实际使用的连接）上，由于进程内缓存和零 IPC 开销，Qbix Server 超过了 nginx。

blocks.html_en: Windows: The server works without pcntl. Static files, PHP scripts, WebSocket, caching, compression, access control — everything works. PHP scripts run in isolated subprocesses via proc_open, so exit() and crashes won't bring down the server. You lose the preload speed benefit (each subprocess starts fresh) and signal-based graceful shutdown. For the full 10x performance advantage, use Linux or macOS (or WSL).

blocks.html_en: No Redis. No message queue. No pub/sub infrastructure. No WebSocket library. No event loop to learn. Just PHP files in a folder.

blocks.html_en: Ephemeral state lives in RAM — static variables in the per-connection process. It's fast (no I/O), isolated (per-user process boundary), and self-cleaning (process dies on disconnect, OS reclaims everything). When you need durability, call your preloaded classes to write to a database. When you need to notify others, call $room->broadcast().

sentences.en: Ephemeral state lives in RAM — static variables in the per-connection process.
sentences.zh: 临时状态存在于 RAM 中——每个连接进程中的静态变量。

sentences.en: It's fast (no I/O), isolated (per-user process boundary), and self-cleaning (process dies on disconnect, OS reclaims everything).
sentences.zh: 它快速（无 I/O）、隔离（每个用户进程边界）和自清理（进程在断开连接时终止，操作系统回收所有内容）。

sentences.en: When you need durability, call your preloaded classes to write to a database.
sentences.zh: 当您需要持久性时，请调用预加载的类来写入数据库。

sentences.en: When you need to notify others, call $room->broadcast().
sentences.zh: 当你需要通知其他人时，调用$room->broadcast()。

blocks.html_en: The same handlers/ directory serves HTTP requests, WebSocket messages, and routed clean URLs. The same classes/ directory is preloaded and shared across all of them. One server, one codebase, one mental model.

sentences.en: The same handlers/ directory serves HTTP requests, WebSocket messages, and routed clean URLs.
sentences.zh: 相同的 handlers/ 目录提供 HTTP 请求、WebSocket 消息和路由的干净 URL。

sentences.en: The same classes/ directory is preloaded and shared across all of them.
sentences.zh: 相同的类/目录已预加载并在所有类之间共享。

sentences.en: One server, one codebase, one mental model.
sentences.zh: 一台服务器，一种代码库，一种思维模型。

blocks.html_en: When you outgrow it — when you need the full dispatch pipeline, Streams for real-time data synchronization, or the component-level cache invalidation with Merkle trees — the same handlers run on the Qbix Platform without changes. The upgrade path is adding capability, not rewriting architecture.

sentences.en: When you outgrow it — when you need the full dispatch pipeline, Streams for real-time data synchronization, or the component-level cache invalidation with Merkle trees — the same handlers run on the Qbix Platform without changes.
sentences.zh: 当您的规模超出了它的范围时——当您需要完整的调度管道、用于实时数据同步的流或使用 Merkle 树进行组件级缓存失效时——相同的处理程序在 Qbix 平台上运行，无需进行任何更改。

sentences.en: The upgrade path is adding capability, not rewriting architecture.
sentences.zh: 升级路径是增加功能，而不是重写架构。

content_html_zh:
⚡ Qbix 服务器

一个纯 PHP 网络服务器。 没有 nginx，没有 Apache，没有 php-fpm。 一个进程提供静态文件、PHP 脚本、WebSocket 连接和实时仪表板。

🔟✖️ 在相同硬件上并发 PHP 增加 10 倍

PHP 托管的最大瓶颈是内存。 每个 php-fpm 工作线程独立加载整个框架 - 每个工作线程 30-60MB。 在 8GB 服务器上，最多大约有 160 名工作人员。 这是并发 PHP 请求的上限。

Qbix 服务器在加载您的类后分叉工作人员。 由于写时复制，所有共享代码（框架、配置、自动加载器）仅使用一次内存。 每个工作进程仅为其每个请求数据添加约 5MB：

php-fpm:       8GB ÷ 50MB per worker  =    160 concurrent PHP requests
Qbix Server:   8GB ÷  5MB per worker  =  1,600 concurrent PHP requests

相同的硬件。 相同的 PHP 代码。 服务的用户数量增加了 10 倍。

为什么对于实际应用程序来说它比 nginx + php-fpm 更快

nginx + php-fpm Qbix服务器
🚀 PHP 请求速度 每个请求的引导时间为 10–50 毫秒 0ms — 类加载后，worker 分叉
💾 每个工人的内存 每个 30–60MB（重复） 每个约 5MB（通过写时复制共享库）
👥 并发 PHP (8GB) 约 160 名工人 约 1,600 名工人
🔒 访问控制文件 公共 URL 或 hacky 重写 X-Accel-Redirect — PHP 检查访问，服务器传输文件
🧩 缓存失效 仅整页（清除所有内容） X-Cache-Tree — 使一个组件无效，保留其余组件的缓存
🌐WebSocket 需要单独的服务器 内置 — 每台服务器 40K+ 并发连接
⚙️ Setup 安装 nginx、配置 proxy_pass、php-fpm 池、套接字... php qbixserver.php --端口=8080

使用 keep-alive（浏览器实际使用的），静态文件吞吐量超过 nginx 120-135%。 如果没有 keep-alive，nginx 在原始 I/O 上速度更快，但 keep-alive 是所有现代浏览器的默认设置。 在实际的 PHP 工作负载上，内存和引导程序的节省使得速度显着加快且更具可扩展性。

💡 您始终可以将 nginx、反向代理或 CDN（Cloudflare、CloudFront）放在其前面，以获得更快的 HTTPS 和边缘缓存。 Qbix Server 处理其背后的 PHP 执行、访问控制和智能缓存。

🎯 将文件放入文件夹中。 获取实时服务器。

三种执行模型——HTTP、WebSocket 和 rooms——都是无共享的，都只是文件夹中的 PHP 文件：

handlers/
├── api/users/
│   ├── get.php          ← HTTP: GET /api/users (fork, serve, die)
│   └── post.php         ← HTTP: POST /api/users
├── chat/
│   ├── message.php      ← WebSocket: one process per connection
│   └── join.php         ←   static vars persist across messages
└── game/
    └── room.php         ← Room: one process per room, shared state
                              with configurable tick timer

classes/
└── MyApp/               ← Preloaded and shared across all three models
    ├── Auth.php
    └── Chat.php
Model 工艺寿命 State 清理
HTTP 分叉 → 处理一个请求 → 死亡 无（无共享） 自动——进程退出
WebSocket 分叉 → 处理来自一个用户的所有消息 → 断开连接时死亡 静态变量在消息中持续存在 自动——进程退出
Room 分叉 → 处理房间内所有用户的消息 → 空时死亡 所有成员共享的静态变量 自动——进程退出

没有清理代码。 没有内存泄漏。 用户之间没有状态泄漏。 每个模型都使用 handlers/、classes/ 和 Q::event()。 尝试一下——一个命令，零配置：

php qbixserver.php --root=./web --port=8080

# Clone
git clone https://github.com/Qbix/Server.git
cd Server

# Create a web directory
mkdir web
echo '<h1>Hello World</h1>' > web/index.html

打开http://localhost:8080。就是这样。

# Or serve an existing directory

# Or use the PHAR (single file, ~280KB)

📊 性能

在相同的单核容器、PHP 8.3、Ubuntu 24 上针对 nginx 进行了基准测试。 13KB 静态文件，三局最佳运行，热缓存。

设想 nginx Qbix服务器 Ratio
顺序 (c=1) 10,154 req/s 6,376 req/s 63%
并发（c=10） 12,300 req/s 6,876 req/s 56%
高并发（c=50） 12,919 req/s 7,253 req/s 56%
保持活动状态 (c=10) 26,858 req/s 36,300 req/s 135%
保持活动状态 (c=50) 30,158 req/s 36,300 req/s 120%

并发度为 50 时，超过 50,000 个请求的失败请求为零。 服务器从未崩溃过。

对于上下文：36K req/s 意味着服务器每秒处理 1,800 个并发页面加载（假设每页约 20 个静态资源），所有这些都来自单个 PHP 进程。

🏎️ 为什么不使用 php-fpm？

传统堆栈 — nginx + php-fpm — 工作原理如下：

Request → nginx → FastCGI socket → php-fpm worker
                                     ↓
                                   Load PHP
                                   Include autoloader
                                   Boot framework
                                   Connect to DB
                                   Run your code
                                   Send response
                                     ↓
                                   Worker resets or dies

每个 PHP 请求都会支付引导成本。 即使使用 OPcache，每个 php-fpm 工作线程也会根据每个请求重新初始化框架的类实例、配置树和数据库连接。 对于像 Qbix（或 Laravel、Symfony 等）这样的框架，此引导程序需要 10-50 毫秒——通常比实际工作要长。

Qbix Server 完全消除了这个问题：

Startup:
  1. Load PHP
  2. Include autoloader
  3. Load ALL framework classes into memory
  4. Parse ALL config files
  5. Connect to database
  6. pcntl_fork() → workers inherit everything
                     ↓
Request:
  Worker already has classes, config, DB connections.
  Just run your code. 0ms bootstrap.

关键的见解是预加载后分叉。 Unix fork() 使用写时复制，因此分叉的工作线程为所有这些预加载的类共享父级的内存页面。 每个工作进程以约 30MB 共享（只读）开始，并且仅分配每个请求的数据。 将此与 php-fpm 进行比较，其中每个工作人员独立加载所有内容，使用 30MB × N 工作人员的重复内存。

预加载类

使用 --workers=N 标志并配置要预加载的类：

{
    "Q": {
        "webserver": {
            "preload": [
                "Q_Dispatcher", "Q_Request", "Q_Response",
                "Q_Config", "Q_Cache", "Q_Session",
                "Db", "Db_Mysql", "Db_Row", "Db_Query",
                "Users", "Users_User", "Users_Session",
                "Streams", "Streams_Stream", "Streams_Message"
            ]
        }
    }
}
# Start with 4 workers (classes loaded once, shared across all)
php qbixserver.php --app=/path/to/myapp --port=8080 --workers=4

父进程加载并解析预加载列表中的每个类，然后分叉。 Workers 继承整个加载状态——OPcache 条目、类定义、解析的配置树、自动加载器映射。 每个worker中的第一个PHP请求全速运行，没有冷启动。

数字

php-fpm Qbix服务器
根据请求引导 10–50ms 0ms
每个工人的内存 每个 30–60MB 30MB 共享 + 每个工作人员约 5MB
工控机开销 FastCGI套接字+序列化 直接函数调用或 Unix fork
静态文件 单独的nginx进程 同一进程、内存缓存、单次写入
配置重新加载 重启所有worker SIGHUP，零停机
WebSocket 需要单独的服务器 内置

对于加载了 20 个插件的 Qbix 应用程序，与 nginx + php-fpm 相比，仅引导程序节省就可以使服务器处理 PHP 请求的速度提高 2-5 倍。

为什么它在实践中实际上更快

上述基准测试测量静态文件吞吐量，其中 nginx 的 C 实现和 sendfile() 系统调用赋予它固有的优势。 但对于真正的 PHP 应用程序，情况却相反：

  • nginx + php-fpm：0.1ms 静态文件 + 30ms PHP 引导 + 5ms 实际工作 = 35ms
  • Qbix服务器：0.15ms静态文件+0ms引导+5ms实际工作=5ms

在静态文件上损失的 0.05 毫秒，每个 PHP 请求都会获得 30 毫秒的时间。 并且您始终可以将 nginx 或 CDN 放在静态文件边缘的前面。

⚖️ 与 FrankenPHP 和 Swoole 对比

如果您正在关注 php-fpm 之外的内容，您可能已经见过 FrankenPHP 和 Swoole。 他们的比较如下：

弗兰肯PHP 斯沃尔 Qbix服务器
语言 Go + C（嵌入 PHP） PHP 的 C 扩展 纯PHP
安装 下载 Go 二进制文件或 Docker pecl install swoole（编译C） php qbixserver.php — 无需安装
建筑学 工作模式（持久） 基于协程（持久） 预加载 fork 后不共享任何内容
状态泄漏 ⚠️ 可能——工作人员在请求之间坚持不懈 ⚠️可能——必须仔细管理全局变量 ✅ 不可能——每个请求都会得到一个干净的叉子
PHP 兼容性 大多数代码都可以工作，但有一些边缘情况 许多扩展不兼容，阻塞 I/O 会破坏协程 ✅ 100% — 标准 PHP，没什么异常
内存安全 Go运行时 + PHP = 复杂的交互 C 扩展 = 段错误风险 仅 PHP = 默认内存安全
访问控制 没有 X-Accel-Redirect 等效项 手动实施 ✅ 内置 X-Accel-Redirect
组件缓存 No No ✅ X-Cache-Tree — 子页面失效
早期提示 / 103 ✅ Yes No 通过 amphp
HTTP/2 ✅ 内置（球童） ✅ 内置 ✅ 通过 amphp
WebSocket 通过美居酒店 ✅ 内置 ✅ 内置

无共享优势

FrankenPHP 和 Swoole 让 PHP 工作人员在请求之间保持活动状态。 这很快，但这意味着全局状态、静态变量、数据库连接和内存缓存在不相关的请求之间持续存在。 这会导致微妙的错误：

// This leaks between requests in FrankenPHP/Swoole:
class UserService {
    private static ?User $cached = null;
    
    public static function current(): User {
        if (!self::$cached) {
            self::$cached = User::fromSession();
        }
        return self::$cached; // Returns previous user's data!
    }
}

每个使用静态变量、单例或全局状态的 PHP 框架、库和代码片段都会成为潜在的安全漏洞。 你必须审核一切。

Qbix Server 完全避免了这种情况。 Workers 从预加载的父级分叉，因此它们继承加载的类和解析的配置（只读，通过写入时复制共享）。 但每个请求都在自己的进程中运行——当它完成时，一切都消失了。 没有状态泄漏。 无需审核。 您现有的 PHP 代码的工作方式与 php-fpm 上的工作方式完全相同。

“只有 PHP”的优势

FrankenPHP 需要 Go 工具来构建或捆绑 Caddy 的预构建二进制文件。 Swoole 需要编译 C 扩展，这可能与其他扩展冲突，并且不适用于所有托管环境。

Qbix 服务器是一个 PHP 文件。 如果可以运行 php -v，则可以运行服务器。 它使用大多数系统上预安装的标准 PHP 扩展（套接字、pcntl）。 没有编译步骤，没有外部运行时，没有二进制兼容性问题。

# FrankenPHP
docker pull dunglas/frankenphp  # 150MB+ image, or build from Go source

# Swoole
pecl install swoole             # compiles C, may fail on some systems
# Then edit php.ini, restart php...

# Qbix Server
php qbixserver.php --port=8080  # done

什么时候选择什么

如果您想要 Caddy 的生态系统（自动 HTTPS、HTTP/3）并且不介意 Go 作为依赖项，请选择 FrankenPHP。 适合已经使用 Octane 的 Laravel 项目。

如果您需要协程进行高并发 I/O（数千个并发 HTTP 客户端请求、数据库查询），请选择 Swoole。 适合异步密集型微服务。

如果您想要无共享安全、零安装部署、访问控制文件服务、组件级缓存失效以及与现有 PHP 代码完全兼容，请选择 Qbix Server。 非常适合提供页面（不仅仅是 API）、需要细粒度缓存并且需要尽可能简单的部署的应用程序。

类别 你得到什么
静态文件 ETag、304 未修改、上次修改、MIME 类型检测、内存中响应缓存
